summary_ja: Blog triage supplement for 2026-06-26. Prior triage already processed 4 articles (2 takes: Gary Marcus Generative AI Fizzle, Simon Willison AI and Liability; 2 references: Scrutineer, Jailbreaking isn't theft). This supplement evaluates the remaining 13 candidates + 3 unsaved = 16 items. One clear ★★★★★ take identified: Andrew Nesbitt's 'CVE-2026-LGTM' — a satirical AI supply chain security incident report illustrating every failure mode of AI-augmented security gates. One ★★★☆☆ reference: lcamtuf's AI children's books body horror — supplements existing entity page content. 11 skips (non-AI technical blog posts, math, infrastructure policy, Apple pricing, CAPTCHA-walled content). 3 unsaved articles all skipped (unreachable/non-AI content).

decisions.title: AI children's books, body horror edition
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Michal ZalewskiがAI生成児童書の実態を調査。AmazonベストセラーのAI生成百科事典を購入し、イラストがボディホラーとしか言いようのない品質であることを実証。既存entity/lcamtuf.mdの「AIコンテンツスロップ検出」節（準決定論的出力理論）を具体的事例で補強するが、概念的枠組みに新規性はない。

decisions.title: datasette-export-database 0.3a2
decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ Datasetteプラグインのバージョン修正リリース。pyproject.tomlの依存バージョン制約を緩和しただけの小さな変更。AI/LLMトピック無関係。
